## Pull Request

### Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

### Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New example
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other

### Testing
- [ ] All tests pass: `pytest`
- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Examples validate: `axon syntax examples/*.ax && axon validate examples/*.ax`
- [ ] Examples run: `axon run examples/your_example.ax --mock`

### Checklist
- [ ] Code follows existing style
- [ ] No personal data, API keys, or hardcoded paths
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
